title: Bren (disambiguation)
content:
'''Bren''' may refer to one of the following:

==[[In-universe]]==
===[[Canon]]===
*'''[[Bren]]''', a [[Jedi Initiate]]
*'''[[Bren Derlin]]''', an [[officer]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebel Alliance]]
*'''[[Bren Quersey]]''', a [[Rebel pilot]]

===[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]===
*'''[[Bren (clone trooper)|Bren]]''', a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]]
*'''[[Bren (SIS)|Bren]]''', a [[Republic Strategic Information Service|SIS]] agent
*'''[[Bren Derlin/Legends|Bren Derlin]]''', a prominent [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] officer
*'''[[Bren Kingal]]''', [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] resident
*'''[[Bren Quersey/Legends|Bren Quersey]]''', a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]]
*'''[[Malvander Bren]]''', the Imperial [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of [[Solem]]
*'''[[Taggor Bren]]''', a Tatooinian [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]]
*'''[[Tomax Bren/Legends|Tomax Bren]]''', an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] fighter pilot and engineer
*'''[[Yolan Bren]]''', a [[Solem]] rebel and the brother of Malvander

==Real world==
*'''''[[Taggor Bren: One Dangerous Bounty Hunter]]''''', a short story in [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 1|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 1]] concerning [[Taggor Bren]]

==See also==
*Any of various topics using the name '''[[Brenn (disambiguation)|Brenn]]'''.

}}
